$schemaNotes: Server/CI-only monitoring registry. Never loaded by index.html or app.js. See docs/operations/employer-feed-monitoring.md.

sources.notes: Existing LIVE Lever integration (api/dnb-lever-jobs.js, unmodified by this monitoring process). This entry independently rechecks source availability and searches for new qualifying Jacksonville student/early-talent postings; it does not affect the browser-facing endpoint or its registry (live-opportunity-sources.js).

Fanatics Corporate board. Platform and reachability confirmed per docs/integrations/fanatics-greenhouse-validation.md (decision: HOLD, 2026-07-14 review found 25 jobs, 2 Jacksonville-located, neither student-relevant). Watching for a qualifying Jacksonville student/early-talent posting; not connected to the WorkJax UI.

Fanatics Collectibles board. Board token confirmed via docs/integrations/ats-source-audit.md; this board's live content has not yet been independently reviewed the way fanaticsinc was in docs/integrations/fanatics-greenhouse-validation.md. Watching alongside the Corporate board; not connected to the WorkJax UI.

Miller Electric's own official internship page (mecojax.com) links directly to this public EMCOR iCIMS job search. This is controlled monitoring of the public career-portal HTML that any visitor can see — not the authenticated iCIMS customer/integration API (api.icims.com), which this project does not use and has no credentials for. Public iCIMS HTML is less stable than Lever/Greenhouse JSON and may change layout without notice; a parsing failure is reported as a source-health warning, never silently treated as zero jobs. Monitoring here never publishes anything to the WorkJax UI — a qualifying posting still requires human review and a separate, later decision before any UI change.
